error.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
error.generic: Sign in failed. Please try again.

createStaff.title: Create Staff Account
createStaff.desc: Provision a new staff account. Interviewers can only view the results of candidates they invite.
createStaff.descSuperAdmin: Super Admins have full access and can create new staff.
createStaff.descAdmin: As an Admin, you can create new interviewers and see their results.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.desc: Update the password for your current account. For security, you may need to sign out and sign back in before changing your password.
settings.successMessage: Password updated successfully! Next time you log in, use the new password.
settings.requiresRelogin: For security reasons, please sign out and sign back in before changing your password.

challenge.title: SDET Challenge
challenge.desc: A three-stage technical evaluation covering API testing, database queries, and live code review. Complete all stages to receive your final score.
challenge.preRegisteredDesc: Your interviewer has set up this assessment for you. Click below when you're ready to begin.
challenge.hint: Click any code line, file, or folder you suspect is a bug — confirm inline.
challenge.noChallengesToRun: This position has no challenges yet. Generate the question bank from the position page first.
challenge.greatWork: Great work. The interviewer will review your answers and end the session shortly.

report.discardConfirmMessage: This will mark candidate "{{name}}" as discarded.
report.runningAiEval: Running the AI evaluation — this usually takes 20–40 seconds.
report.sessionCompletedNoReport: The session is completed but no report was saved. You can generate it manually below.
report.evalRunsAutomatically: The evaluation runs automatically when the interviewer clicks "End Interview". This session is still in progress.
report.hireConfirmMessage: This will close the position "{{title}}" and mark all other sessions as not selected.

bias.noBiasDetected: A second AI pass reviewed this report for gender-coded language, cultural-fit assumptions, appearance references, and other potential bias signals. Nothing flagged.
bias.passagesFlagged: {{count}} passage flagged for potentially biased language. Review and consider the suggested neutral alternatives before sharing.
bias.passagesFlagged_plural: {{count}} passages flagged for potentially biased language. Review and consider the suggested neutral alternatives before sharing.

room.signInRequired: Sign-in required. Open the admin dashboard in another tab and sign in first.
room.invalidRoomLink: Invalid room link — missing session, role, or token.
room.sessionNotFound: Session not found. The link may be expired or revoked.
room.invalidToken: Invalid token for this role. Ask your interviewer for a fresh link.
room.sessionClaimed: This session was already joined by a different candidate. Ask your interviewer to schedule a new one.
room.endConfirmMessage: This will mark the session as completed and generate the AI evaluation report.
room.safelyCloseTab: You can safely close this tab.

endingOverlayDesc.evaluating:
Running the AI evaluation — this usually takes 20–40 seconds.
Please don't close this window.
endingOverlayDesc.saving: Saving the report to the database…
endingOverlayDesc.auditing: Running a bias audit on the evaluation — almost done.
endingOverlayDesc.closing: Closing the session and notifying the candidate…

room.meetingEndedDesc: The interviewer has left the call, but you can continue working on your challenge.
room.interviewerBeginShortly:
Your interviewer will begin the session shortly.
You can chat with them and introduce yourself in the meantime.
room.introGreetingDesc: Use this time to introduce yourself, explain the format of the interview, and ask the candidate to briefly introduce themselves. The transcript is already recording this for soft-skill evaluation.
room.candidateProgressDesc: Live view of every challenge as the candidate submits it.
room.videoEmbedPlaceholder: Jitsi / Daily.co embed lands in Phase 2c.

micBanner.unsupported: ⚠ Your browser doesn't support live transcription. Use Chrome, Edge, or Safari.

micStatus.unsupported: Web Speech API not supported in this browser

script.qaCompletedDesc: The candidate is now completing the assigned challenges.

cvAnalysis.title: CV Pre-Screen Analysis
cvAnalysis.questionsToVerify: Claims to Verify in This Interview

positions.title: Positions
positions.subtitle: Paste a job description; AI parses it and generates a tailored question bank.
positions.empty: No positions yet. Click "+ New Position from JD" to create one.
positions.closeConfirmMessage: This position will no longer accept new sessions.
positions.reopenConfirmMessage: This position will accept new sessions again.
positions.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete the position, all its challenges, all candidate sessions, transcripts, and answers.

wizard.placeholder: Paste the full job description here…
wizard.consoleDetail: Open the browser DevTools console (F12) for the full stack trace.
wizard.instruction: Confirm or edit before generating the question bank. AI may have misread some fields.
wizard.title: Title
wizard.generatingDesc:
Please do not close this window or navigate away.

Saving position and generating tailored questions with AI — this usually takes 30–60s.

stages.callingWorker: calling AI worker for question bank

positions.noSessionsEmpty: No interviews scheduled yet. Click "+ Schedule Interview" to create one.
positions.deleteSessionConfirmMessage: This will permanently remove the session for "{{name}}".
positions.regenerateLinkConfirmMessage: This will invalidate the previous link. The candidate will need the new URL to join. Any previous candidate who already joined will be locked out.
positions.regenerateLinkSuccess: New candidate link copied to clipboard!

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.name: Name
leaderboard.empty: No results yet. Be the first!
leaderboard.clearRestricted: Clearing records is restricted to Super Admin only via Firebase console.
leaderboard.deleteConfirm: Delete all scores? This cannot be undone.

mic.title: Microphone Access Required
mic.desc: This interview uses live transcription. Please allow microphone access when prompted.

result.title: Stage Complete!
result.gradeNeedsImprovement: Needs improvement. Review automation best practices.

schedule.title: Schedule Interview
schedule.ttlHint: Two unique links will be generated, valid for {{hours}} hours. You'll need to share the candidate link manually (Slack, email, etc.).
schedule.ttlHint2: Two unique links will be generated, valid until the end of the interview date. Share the candidate link via Slack, email, etc.
schedule.dateInPastError: Date cannot be in the past.
schedule.cvHint: Click to upload CV (required for AI pre-screen)
schedule.cvRequired: Please attach the candidate's CV before creating the session.
schedule.cvTypeError: Unsupported file type. Please upload a PDF or .txt file.
schedule.cvEmptyError: Could not extract text from the CV. Try a different file.
schedule.cvAnalysisError: CV analysis failed. Please try again.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.subtitle: Every LLM call made by this platform. Showing the 200 most recent.
audit.noCallsYet: No AI calls have been logged yet.
audit.noMatchFilter: No entries match the current filter.

questions.title: Questions
questions.visibilitySuperAdmin: Global questions are visible to all staff.
questions.visibilityAdmin: Your questions are visible to you and interviewers you created.
questions.visibilityInterviewer: Your questions are visible to you and your admin.
questions.emptyState: No questions yet. Click "+ New Question" to create the first one.
questions.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently remove the question from the bank.

compare.title: Compare Candidates
compare.subtitle: Comparing {{count}} candidates
compare.pickMinimum: Pick at least 2 candidates to compare
compare.pickMinimumHint: On the position page, tick the checkboxes next to completed sessions, then click "Compare selected".

aiSuggestions.title: AI Suggestions
aiSuggestions.noSuggestionsYet: Suggestions appear once there are a few exchanges to analyze.

scorecard.title: Scorecard
scorecard.builderDesc: Add, edit, or remove questions from the manual evaluation scorecard. Changes apply immediately to all new evaluations.
scorecard.deleteCategoryMessage: This will remove the entire category and all its questions from the scorecard.
scorecard.codeChallengeDesc: This challenge is scored separately out of 16 points.
